East Africa

Tanzania Travel Guide

Best for travelers who want classic northern circuit icons, high-impact wildlife, and a beach finish.

General information about Tanzania

Tanzania delivers some of Africa’s most cinematic safari landscapes, from Serengeti migration scenes to the Ngorongoro Crater and Zanzibar’s coast.

Getting around

Most trips flow through Arusha, Kilimanjaro International Airport, or Dar es Salaam depending on whether the route is inland safari or coast-first.

Best time to visit

June to October is the cleanest safari season for much of the north, while January to March works well for southern Serengeti calving and beach add-ons.

Planning notes

Use this country page to compare attractions, understand how to move between them, and decide whether the trip works best as a standalone route or part of a broader regional circuit.

Country at a glance

Tanzania

  • 1 active tour operator profiles
  • 2 accommodations nearby

Tanzania

Serengeti National Park

Vast migration landscapes, apex predators, and one of Africa’s strongest safari names.

★ 4.9 (1,196) From $110

Tanzania

Zanzibar

A safari-and-coast favorite built around Stone Town, beaches, and slower Indian Ocean pacing.

★ 4.7 (983) From $35
Indian Ocean coast of Tanzania
